meaning: (Member of)Voluntary Aid Detachment (英国)志愿救护支队(队员)
examples: OBJECTIVE To study the effect on cognitive ability and the neuronal injury caused by diabetes in VaD rats.
Surgeons in the United States and Europe have implanted such ventricular assistance devices (VAD) in 220 patients since 2000.
Objective: To study the effects of vitamin a deficiency (VAD) on brain development, learning and memory ability in young rats.
On the one side are doctors such as Vad who do everything they can to avoid opioid painkillers such as Percocet and OxyContin.
Vad says he avoids narcotic painkillers for two major reasons.
